title: Florida Lawmakers Push Forward First State-Level Stablecoin Oversight Bill
description:
Florida lawmakers approved a bill requiring stablecoin issuers to obtain licenses from the state’s Office of Financial Regulation.

The post Florida Lawmakers Push Forward First State-Level Stablecoin Oversight Bill appeared first on Cryptonews.

title: Trump’s National Cyber Strategy Backs Crypto Security in Post-Quantum Era
description:
Trump’s newly released National Cyber Strategy outlines federal support for strengthening the security of cryptocurrencies.

The post Trump’s National Cyber Strategy Backs Crypto Security in Post-Quantum Era appeared first on Cryptonews.

title: Kalshi, Polymarket Discuss Fundraising at $20B Valuations: Report
description:
Prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket are exploring potential fundraising rounds that could value each company at around $20 billion.

The post Kalshi, Polymarket Discuss Fundraising at $20B Valuations: Report appeared first on Cryptonews.

title: Washington Man Sentenced to 2 Years for Diverting $35M to Failed DeFi Platform
description:
A former Washington CFO was sentenced to two years in prison for diverting $35 million in company funds into a failed DeFi investment scheme.

The post Washington Man Sentenced to 2 Years for Diverting $35M to Failed DeFi Platform appeared first on Cryptonews.

title: Kalshi Faces Class Action Lawsuit Over Khamenei Prediction Market Payout
description:
Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit over how it resolved a prediction market on Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

The post Kalshi Faces Class Action Lawsuit Over Khamenei Prediction Market Payout appeared first on Cryptonews.

title: Orbital data center company to start mining Bitcoin in space
description: Starcloud CEO Philip Johnston noted that it is 30 times cheaper to mine Bitcoin on ASICs than on GPUs in space on a kilowatt-hour basis.

title: Flow Foundation files court motion to block Korean exchange delistings
description: Every major global exchange has restored full FLOW services, said the Foundation on Monday.

title: Bitcoin correlation with tech stocks overblown: NYDIG
description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says that Bitcoin and tech stocks aren’t converging and are likely just reacting to macroeconomic conditions rather than trading in tandem.

title: Crypto regulatory clarity matters more for banks, ex-CFTC chief says
description: If the CLARITY Act fails to pass, Giancarlo said he expects Paul Atkins at the SEC and Mike Selig at the CFTC will likely write rules to create clarity for the industry.

title: Crypto funding up 50% in 12 months as fewer, larger deals dominate
description: Despite a rise in crypto fundraising, Messari’s Eric Turner noted that no major crypto VCs have closed rounds except Dragonfly recently, stating that crypto “needs some fresh capital.”
